raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need a bash command that finds duplicate filenames case-insensitive. Use find, basename, tr to lower, sort, uniq -d. But need list of duplicates. Command: find /workspace -type f -printf '%f\n' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sort | uniq -d. That prints names. If want full paths? But duplicates by name only. Provide one line.
